---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed papers on safe autonomy, reachability-based planning, and nonlinear control by Evanns Morales-Cuadrado."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

/* Uses shared tokens from styles.css: --accent, --bg-secondary, --text-secondary, --border */

.pubs-shell {
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem clamp(1rem, 2vw, 2rem) 5rem;
}

.pubs-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.pubs-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.6vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.05;
}

.pubs-intro {
  max-width: 52rem;
  margin: 0 0 2.4rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

.pubs-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding-left: 0;
  margin: 0;
}

.pubs-list > li {
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  padding: 1.1rem 1.25rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.72;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}

.pubs-list > li:hover {
  border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
}

body.quarto-light .pubs-list > li {
  color: #111827;
}

body.quarto-dark .pubs-list > li {
  color: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.96);
}

.pubs-list > li:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.pubs-list > li p {
  margin: 0;
}

.pubs-list a {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.pub-marker {
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-right: 0.35rem;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.pubs-footnote {
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .pubs-shell {
    padding: 2.5rem 1rem 4rem;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="pubs-shell">
  <p class="pubs-kicker">Publications</p>
  <p class="pubs-title">Research Papers.</p>
  <p class="pubs-intro">
    Published work, including my undergraduate honors thesis for the sake of nostalgia.
  </p>
```

{{< include ../cv/_sections/publications-shared.qmd >}}

```{=html}
  <p class="pubs-footnote">* <em>indicates equal contribution</em></p>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var shell = document.querySelector('.pubs-shell');
  if (!shell) return;
  var list = shell.querySelector('ol');
  if (!list) return;

  list.classList.add('pubs-list');

  var items = Array.prototype.slice.call(list.children);
  var total = items.length;

  items.forEach(function (item, index) {
    var marker = document.createElement('span');
    marker.className = 'pub-marker';
    marker.textContent = '[' + (total - index) + '] ';
    var paragraph = item.querySelector(':scope > p');
    if (paragraph) {
      paragraph.insertBefore(marker, paragraph.firstChild);
    } else {
      item.insertBefore(marker, item.firstChild);
    }
  });
});
</script>
```
